/opt/devkitpro/devkitARM/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc -march=armv6k -mtune=mpcore -mfloat-abi=hard -mtp=soft -mword-relocations -ffunction-sections -D__3DS__ -g -O2 -DNDEBUG -L/opt/devkitpro/libctru/lib -L/opt/devkitpro/portlibs/3ds/lib -specs=3dsx.specs CMakeFiles/cinnamon.dir/src/binary_reader.o CMakeFiles/cinnamon.dir/src/data_win.o CMakeFiles/cinnamon.dir/src/data_win_print.o CMakeFiles/cinnamon.dir/src/ini.o CMakeFiles/cinnamon.dir/src/input_recording.o CMakeFiles/cinnamon.dir/src/instance.o CMakeFiles/cinnamon.dir/src/json_reader.o CMakeFiles/cinnamon.dir/src/json_writer.o CMakeFiles/cinnamon.dir/src/noop_file_system.o CMakeFiles/cinnamon.dir/src/runner.o CMakeFiles/cinnamon.dir/src/runner_keyboard.o CMakeFiles/cinnamon.dir/src/vm.o CMakeFiles/cinnamon.dir/src/vm_builtins.o CMakeFiles/cinnamon.dir/src/n3ds/main.o -o cinnamon.elf  -lcitro2d -lcitro3d -lctru -lm -lctru -lm
